commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And it shall come to pass, that he that is left in Zion, and he that remains in Jerusalem, shall be called holy, even everyone that is recorded among the living in Jerusalem: Life. Only the faithful shall be saved. (Worthington) The Jews, after the captivity, shall be more obedient. But converts to the faith of Christ are styled saints, (Romans i. ) such particularly as are predestined to glory, Romans viii. (Calmet) Those who are called to life and the true faith, may forfeit this honour, by their own fault. (Menochius).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
